summary: Applied a minimal seam-polish pass to tighten the handoff from chapter 14 and clarify the flotilla shape that chapter 16 opens on, without changing chapter beats or voice.
edits: Anchored the opening sentence to Salt Room so the chapter enters directly out of the prior chapter's break.
Specified that Riva's side is hauling the old funeral ferry into the side channel to match the next chapter's opening image.
Refined the final launch beat to show Daro's lead group as stolen skiffs and pilgrim punts before the pursuit flotilla follows.
